summary: Lexical BM25 retrieval over drift's own verified fact sources (POLICY, ROADMAP, ADRs, audit artefacts, signal rationales, benchmark evidence) exposed as drift_retrieve and drift_cite MCP tools with stable Fact-IDs and a SHA-anchored corpus manifest.

corpus.rebuild_consistency: sha256 identical across repeated builds with cache cleared

precision_at_5_gold_set.note: Hand-curated query -> expected fact_id-prefix pairs in tests/test_retrieval_search.py::GOLD_SET (POLICY sections, major ADRs).

latency_ms.measurement: 10 representative queries on drift repo (1318 chunks), Windows Python 3.11.9

tests.skipped_reason: MCP tool registry introspection skips when FastMCP is not installed (optional 'mcp' extra).

notes: Lexical-only MVP (BM25 Okapi k1=1.5 b=0.75). No semantic/embedding layer; ADR-091 documents Phase-2 hook if ADR-031's demarcation is revisited.
Instruction-level grounding via .github/instructions/drift-rag-grounding.instructions.md — no hard CI enforcement in MVP (soft gate).
drift.agent.prompt.md extension deferred: file is regenerated by drift intent --phase 3 via handoff(); grounding contract is routed through llms.txt and the new instruction file instead.
